title: Expr
description: Policy expression AST. A boolean expression evaluated against the calling user and (optionally) a table row. Composed of literals, references ({"row": "..."} / {"user": "..."}), and single-key operator nodes.

RowRef.title: Row reference
RowRef.description: Reference to a field on the row being evaluated. Use 'id', 'created_by', 'organization_id', or 'data.<field>' to reach into the document data.

row.description: Field path on the row, e.g. 'created_by', 'organization_id', 'data.status'.

UserRef.title: User reference
UserRef.description: Reference to a field on the calling user.

user.description: USER field. Allowed: user_id, email, organization_id, is_platform_admin, role_ids, role_names.

Call.title: Function call
Call.description: Invoke a registered policy function. Currently: has_role(role_name).

Operand.description: Anything that can appear as an argument to an operator: literal, reference, or nested expression.

oneOf.title: and
oneOf.description: Logical AND. All operands must be truthy. Requires at least 2 operands.

oneOf.title: or
oneOf.description: Logical OR. At least one operand must be truthy. Requires at least 2 operands.

oneOf.title: not
oneOf.description: Logical NOT of a single operand.

oneOf.title: eq
oneOf.description: Equality: [left, right] — true when left == right.

oneOf.title: neq
oneOf.description: Inequality: [left, right] — true when left != right.

oneOf.title: lt
oneOf.description: Less than: [left, right] — true when left < right.

oneOf.title: lte
oneOf.description: Less than or equal: [left, right] — true when left <= right.

oneOf.title: gt
oneOf.description: Greater than: [left, right] — true when left > right.

oneOf.title: gte
oneOf.description: Greater than or equal: [left, right] — true when left >= right.

oneOf.title: in
oneOf.description: Membership: [operand, [literal, literal, ...]] — true when operand is in the literal list.

oneOf.title: is_null
oneOf.description: True when the operand resolves to null.
